description: Enhance meal-plan output by conditionally inserting one training meal (before any meal target), adding per-meal kcal, and reconciling displayed meal kcal to top-level TDEE via deterministic evening-snack display-only correction.

userStories.title: Insert one conditional training meal
userStories.description: As a user following training-day guidance, I want exactly one training meal to appear when training carbs are prescribed so the plan maps directly to workout fueling.
acceptanceCriteria: When training_carbs_g > 0, output includes exactly one training meal.
When training_carbs_g = 0, output includes no training meal.
Training meal carbs equal training_carbs_g.
Training meal macros are carbs-only: protein_g=0 and fat_g=0.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Place training meal before any meal target
userStories.description: As a user, I want training meal placement to follow --training-before before any meal target so ordering is predictable.
acceptanceCriteria: Training meal insertion position follows --training-before semantics.
Insertion before each supported meal target is deterministic.
At most one training meal appears in output.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Handle training-before-training as semantic runtime error
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want --training-before=training to be parseable but rejected semantically so recursive placement is prevented with deterministic runtime validation.
acceptanceCriteria: Input path can parse training as a syntactic --training-before value.
--training-before=training fails semantic runtime validation deterministically.
Error messaging follows existing validation/runtime conventions.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add per-meal kcal field
userStories.description: As a user, I want each meal to display kcal in addition to macros so I can track per-meal energy intake.
acceptanceCriteria: Each emitted meal includes kcal alongside carbs_g, protein_g, and fat_g.
Per-meal kcal values are macro-derived using existing conversion rules.
Output structure remains deterministic across runs.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Reconcile displayed meal kcal totals to TDEE
userStories.description: As a user, I want the sum of displayed meal kcal to match top-level TDEE exactly so reported totals are trustworthy.
acceptanceCriteria: After rounding and reconciliation, sum(displayed meal kcal) equals top-level TDEE.
Any small rounding delta is corrected by adjusting evening-snack displayed kcal only.
Reconciliation is deterministic and does not change meal ordering.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Keep reconciliation display-only for kcal
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want evening-snack reconciliation to adjust displayed kcal only so macro gram allocations remain unchanged.
acceptanceCriteria: Reconciliation mutates displayed evening-snack kcal only.
Displayed carbs_g, protein_g, and fat_g are unchanged by reconciliation.
Behavior is covered by explicit tests or contract assertions.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add regression tests for insertion, validation, and kcal balancing
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want focused regression tests for training insertion, semantic validation, and kcal reconciliation so future changes do not regress this enhancement.
acceptanceCriteria: Tests cover training meal present and absent behavior for training_carbs_g > 0 and = 0.
Tests cover deterministic insertion ordering for supported --training-before targets.
Tests cover semantic runtime rejection for --training-before=training.
Tests cover training meal carbs-only composition.
Tests cover per-meal kcal emission and exact summed meal-kcal-to-TDEE equality.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Update canonical docs for contract changes
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want canonical docs updated so the new training-meal and kcal output contract is documented and stable.
acceptanceCriteria: Update docs/REQUIREMENTS.md with training-meal insertion rules and semantic rejection of --training-before=training.
Update docs/MODEL.md with output shape changes including optional training meal and per-meal kcal.
Update docs/ARCHITECTURE.md with display-only evening-snack kcal reconciliation targeting TDEE.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
